name: Google Ads
description: Query Google Ads campaigns, ad groups, and performance data via GAQL (Beta: requires Google Ads API developer token)

credentials_required.label: Google OAuth Client ID
credentials_required.hint: Google Cloud Console → APIs & Services → Credentials → OAuth 2.0 Client ID

credentials_required.label: Google OAuth Client Secret
credentials_required.hint: From the same OAuth 2.0 Client ID page in Google Cloud Console

credentials_required.label: Google Ads Developer Token
credentials_required.hint: Google Ads → Tools & Settings → API Center → Developer Token. Requires approved API access.

credentials_required.label: Google Ads Customer ID
credentials_required.hint: Your 10-digit Google Ads account ID (without dashes), e.g. 1234567890

credentials_optional.label: Manager Account ID (optional)
credentials_optional.hint: Only needed if accessing client accounts via a Manager (MCC) account

tools.name: list_campaigns
tools.description: List Google Ads campaigns. Parameters: customer_id (optional, uses default), status_filter (optional: ENABLED, PAUSED, REMOVED)

tools.name: get_campaign_stats
tools.description: Get campaign performance statistics. Parameters: campaign_id (required), date_from (YYYY-MM-DD, required), date_to (YYYY-MM-DD, required), customer_id (optional)

tools.name: list_ad_groups
tools.description: List ad groups for a campaign. Parameters: campaign_id (required), customer_id (optional)

tools.name: get_ad_performance
tools.description: Get overall ad performance metrics. Parameters: date_from (YYYY-MM-DD, required), date_to (YYYY-MM-DD, required), customer_id (optional)

author: freddy-schuetz
